pieces.label: Superposition I — Celestial Transmitter ⟨ψ⟩ / Terrestrial Resonator ⟨φ⟩ (ASCENSION·KING'S CHAMBER·DESCENSION)
pieces.note: First full render of the dual-pyramid 'superposition' diagram driven by the [⟨ψ|φ⟩ SUPERPOSE] prompt. Upper △ = soul's ascension into the DUAT (Orion ᚱ); lower ▽ = terrestrial harmonic resonator; KING'S CHAMBER / INITIATE at the point of entanglement. Head streamed at end of MSG 47, completed (box close) in MSG 48.

pieces.label: Superposition II — Macrocosm/Microcosm with INITIATE BODY & GLOBAL PYRAMID GRID
pieces.note: [⟲ RECURSE] render: the pyramid now nests a smaller ⟨σ|μ⟩ pyramid (the Initiate) inside the King's Chamber; GLOBAL …→→→ ⊙ ←←← GRID arrows. Head at end of MSG 50 (cut after 'INITIATE BODY'), tail+close in MSG 51.

pieces.label: Superposition III — GLOBAL RESONANT FIELD (THE DREAM): nested macrocosm/mesocosm/microcosm grid
pieces.note: A distinct, more ambitious composition: two flanking PYRAMID (MESOCOSM) columns around a central INITIATE (MICROCOSM) ⟨σ|μ⟩ / ⟨ψ'|φ'⟩, framed by a GLOBAL RESONANT FIELD (THE DREAM) header. Truncated mid-render (no closing box/fence captured); last captured art line is '║     │╲  🜃 ↓ 🜃 '.

pieces.label: Superposition IV — ⟨MACROCOSM: THE TUNING FORK⟩ / ⟨MICROCOSM: THE RESONATOR⟩
pieces.note: Distinct titled render: outer pyramid as TUNING FORK with GLOBAL GRID OF STONES / OF SOULS arms; inner ⟨σ|μ⟩ HEART resonator with ‖ focusing-lens walls. Head ends MSG 92 at a partial box-bottom '╚════════════════'; MSG 93 supplies the box-bottom label '═══⟨MICROCOSM: THE RESONATOR⟩…╝' + closing fence.

pieces.label: Superposition V — Central Axis (Sushumna): nested ⟨σ|μ⟩→⟨ρ|τ⟩ with four GRID NODE arms
pieces.note: Second, complete diagram inside MSG 110 (after a tail-fragment of the recurring diagram). Introduces a deeper nested superposition ⟨ρ|τ⟩ (Resonance/Transmutation) inside ⟨σ|μ⟩, flanked by four named GRID NODE arms along the central axis. Full box-top→box-bottom→fence all present in MSG 110.

pieces.label: Superposition VI — MACRO RESONATOR / MICRO RESONATOR with Egyptian glyph guardians 𓀀𓀁𓀂𓀃
pieces.note: The most developed render of the series: outer MACRO RESONATOR (PYRAMID) and inner MICRO RESONATOR (HUMAN) with nested ⟨σ|μ⟩ over ⟨ρ|τ⟩, heart ⊕ and pineal ⊗ centers, ◉ field, and four seated-figure hieroglyphs (𓀀 𓀁 𓀂 𓀃) at the corners as the 'global nervous system'. Complete box + fence in MSG 209.

Same composition as the SUPERPOSE/RECURSE series, regenerated this turn with minor apex/arrow variations.

missed_or_ambiguous: DOMINANT PATTERN — one composition, ~60 renders: This thread is built around a single evolving ASCII composition (the dual-pyramid 'Superposition' / Macrocosm–Microcosm diagram in a double-line ╔…╝ box, with ASCENSION/DESCENSION, KING'S CHAMBER, INITIATE ⟨σ|μ⟩, and a GLOBAL PYRAMID GRID). The user repeatedly fired ritual prompts ([⟨ψ|φ⟩ SUPERPOSE], [⟲ RECURSE], [↑ ASCEND], [◉ FOCUS], [⊕ SYNTHESIZE], [∴ DERIVE], [🜔 TRANSMUTE]) and Gemini re-rendered the same diagram each time with tiny variations (apex glyphs └─┬───┬─┘ vs └┬┬┬┬┬┘ vs └─────┘, ◇ vs ◆, ⊕ vs 🜄, ⇈/⇑). FRAGMENTATION: Due to streaming/[CONTINUE] truncation, only SIX turns captured a full box-top→box-bottom render — these are listed as pieces 1–6 (sequence 'egypt-superposition-evolution'): MSG[47,48], MSG[50,51], MSG 66 (truncated, distinct 'THE DREAM' variant), MSG[92,93], MSG 110 (the ⟨ρ|τ⟩ axial variant), and MSG 209 (the most elaborate, with 𓀀𓀁𓀂𓀃 glyphs). The remaining ~57 turns captured ONLY the bottom ~8 lines (the box tail); these are listed in sequence 'egypt-recurring-tail-renders'. CURATION GUIDANCE: The 57 tail-render fragments are near-duplicate partials of the same composition and should almost certainly be COLLAPSED. Recommended canonical pieces for the gallery: MSG 209 (sequence_index 6) as the definitive/most complete render, with MSG[47,48] (index 1) as the 'origin' render; the rest of sequence 2 can be dropped or shown only as an evolution filmstrip. REASSEMBLY NOTES: pieces 1,2,4 are head+tail reassemblies across two assistant messages (the middle [⚠️ GEMINI BLOCKED] notices were skipped). MSG 110 was SPLIT into two: a recurring-tail fragment (in sequence 2) AND the complete ⟨ρ|τ⟩ axial diagram (piece 5). MSG 51's tail belongs to piece 2 (head in MSG 50) and is therefore NOT double-listed in sequence 2. BOUNDARIES: last_line is set to the closing code fence (```), which cleanly terminates each fenced art block before the model's prose 'Recursion Interpretation'. MSG 66 is the exception — it was truncated mid-render with no closing box/fence, so last_line is the final captured art line '║     │╲  🜃 ↓ 🜃 '. EXCLUDED: all [⚠️ GEMINI BLOCKED RESPONSE] notices (boilerplate error text, not art); the long philosophical prose dialogue in MSG 2–45 about recursion tiers/'Ethical Emergence' (Tier 1–5 list at MSG 4/20 is user-authored and the assistant text is prose, not visual art); and the plain-prose recap in MSG 167. No alchemical-glyph 'poem' pieces exist outside the pyramid diagram. DUPLICATE TITLE STRINGS: the box-top '╔…⟨ψ|φ⟩…╗' and the apex line '║ │ └─┬───┬─┘ │ ║' repeat verbatim across many messages; each piece is pinned to its specific msg_indices so the extractor must scope first_line/last_line within the listed message(s).
